examples.cn: 不合格商品必须下架停售。

examples.en: A witness said the boat was shaking badly.
examples.cn: 一位目击者说船晃得很厉害。

examples.en: Several witnesses supported his story.
examples.cn: 几位证人支持了他的说法。

collocations.cn: 想知道为什么/什么/如何

patterns.title: wonder + 疑问从句
patterns.explain: wonder 后接 if/whether 或 wh- 从句，表示「想知道」。
examples: I wonder if he is at home.
She wondered why he was late.

examples.en: I began to wonder whether I had learned real English at school.
examples.cn: 我开始怀疑自己在学校学的是不是真正的英语。

collocations.en: a wonderful evening around the campfire

examples.en: We had a wonderful evening around the campfire.
examples.cn: 我们围着篝火度过了一个美妙的夜晚。

examples.en: The table is made of wood.
examples.cn: 桌子是木头做的。

examples.en: We walked through the woods.
examples.cn: 我们穿过树林。

examples.en: There is a small wooden bridge over the stream.
examples.cn: 小溪上有一座小木桥。

examples.en: Bundles of wool were lying all over the room.
examples.cn: 房间里到处都是一捆捆羊毛。

examples.en: His first workshop was a small room behind a shop.
examples.cn: 他的第一间作坊是商店后面的一个小房间。

examples.en: I want to see the world.
Dan felt worried because he could not guess what the police wanted. Dan
examples.cn: 很担心，因为他猜不出警察找他干什么。

examples.en: Don't worry, you have done well.
examples.cn: 别担心，你考得很好。

patterns.title: be worth + 名词/动名词
patterns.explain: worth 后接名词或动名词，不接不定式。
examples: The book is worth reading.
It's worth the effort.

patterns.title: would rather do than do
patterns.explain: would rather 后接动词原形；than 后也用原形，表示偏好选择。
examples: I would rather stay at home.
She would rather walk than take a bus.

examples.en: The assistant wrapped the gift in beautiful paper.
examples.cn: 店员用漂亮的纸把礼物包了起来。

examples.en: Their boat was wrecked in a storm.
examples.cn: 他们的船在风暴中失事了。

examples.en: While the drum was shaken, the line wriggled from side to side.
examples.cn: 鼓震动时，线条左右扭动。

examples.en: She is writing a letter now.
examples.cn: 她现在正在写信。

examples.en: Yes, I am.
examples.cn: 是的，我是。

examples.en: It happened yesterday.
examples.cn: 这事发生在昨天。

patterns.title: yet 的位置
patterns.explain: yet 常用于现在完成时的否定句和疑问句句末。
examples: He hasn't arrived yet.
Have you seen it yet?

examples.en: Has the bus come yet?
examples.cn: 公交车来了吗？

examples.en: Who is this young man?
Is this your pen?
examples.cn: 这是你的钢笔吗？

examples.en: Zoning laws separate factories from residential districts.
examples.cn: 分区法规将工厂与居住区隔开。
